transcription.raw_text: دكتورة، أنا عندي حرارة وبرد وتعب شديد، وعندي ألم بالمفاصل وصداع، وعمري تسعة وخمسين سنة
transcription.cleaned_text: دكتورة، أنا عندي حرارة وبرد وتعب شديد، وعندي ألم بالمفاصل وصداع، وعمري تسعة وخمسين سنة

segments.speaker: patient
segments.text: دكتورة، أنا عندي حرارة وبرد وتعب شديد، وعندي ألم بالمفاصل وصداع، وعمري تسعة وخمسين سنة

uncertain_words.reason: Levantine برد can mean chills (rigor) or a common cold — clinical distinction is critical with fever
Severity qualifier — helps stratify sepsis risk vs viral syndrome

subjective.chief_complaint: Acute febrile illness with chills, severe fatigue, polyarthralgia, and headache — 59-year-old female
history_of_present_illness: Chills (برد) — rigor vs subjective cold unclear

exam_findings: Temperature, BP, and systemic examination pending
Lymphadenopathy, rash, and joint swelling not yet assessed

assessment.summary: Acute febrile illness with systemic features — viral syndrome most likely (influenza, COVID-19). Connective tissue disease or early sepsis must be considered given polyarthralgia and severity.
unsupported_or_inferred: CTD considered given polyarthralgia — requires ANA/RF screen
Sepsis considered given severe fatigue — requires clinical reassessment

recommended_clarifications: ANA, RF, anti-CCP if symptoms persist >7 days
patient_instructions_draft: Return if symptoms worsen or fever persists >72 hours
Empirical antibiotics only if bacterial source identified

claims.text: Viral syndrome most likely given acute onset and systemic features
CTD must be considered given polyarthralgia in 59-year-old female with systemic features
Early sepsis in differential — severity of fatigue warrants clinical reassessment

evidence_support.note: Viral syndrome well-supported, CTD appropriately raised

completeness.note: Travel history and skin/lymph exam missing

self_eval.summary: Good note. برد (chills vs cold) distinction is clinically relevant — confirm whether patient had rigors.

uncertainty.summary: Reliable note. Key ambiguity is whether برد represents true rigors (suggesting systemic infection) or subjective cold sensation.

claim_evaluations.note: Viral syndrome consistent but not confirmed
CTD appropriately flagged for 59F with polyarthralgia
Sepsis is a differential but not strongly supported

physician_questions.title: Chills character
physician_questions.question: Did the patient describe true rigors (shaking/uncontrollable shivering) or just feeling cold (برد)?
physician_questions.reason: Rigors suggest bacteraemia or high-grade viral infection — changes management urgency

physician_questions.title: Joint involvement
physician_questions.question: How many joints are affected and is there visible swelling (ألم بالمفاصل)?
physician_questions.reason: Oligoarthralgia vs polyarthralgia changes differential (reactive vs viral vs CTD)
